name: 杰莉拉·塔莱姆希
name_full: 杰莉拉·塔莱姆希 Jalila Talemsi
introduction: A Moroccan actress from the city of Safi, and a graduate of the High Institute of Theatrical Arts and Cultural Animation. She played several bold roles and won the award for the best female role at the Tangier Festival. She also won many awards, including the award for Best Actress for her role in Androman - Blood and Coal at the 28th session of the Alexandria Mediterranean Film Festival, in Egypt. She also represented Morocco in many film festivals, including the World Monologue Film Festival in the United Arab Emirates in 2016. Her works include Please Divorce Me (2022), Starve Your Dog (2015), and The Ghoul (2016).
